layoutRegions.name: hero
layoutRegions.purpose: Explain the vault recovery drill state and expose packet sealing.

layoutRegions.name: drill-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare vault drills by owner, lease timing, identity proof, evidence state, and progress.

layoutRegions.name: evidence-workbench
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect secret lease timing, recovery ownership, failed unwrap attempts, cleanup attestations, and sealed evidence packet content.

components.name: MetricCard
components.purpose: Show vault drill totals and risk tone without changing layout height.

components.name: DrillCard
components.purpose: Show a vault recovery drill with owner, status, lease, identity proof, evidence state, and progress.
interactions: status chip stacks cleanly on mobile

components.name: EvidenceRow
components.purpose: Dense rows for lease lanes, owners, cleanup attestations, and evidence packet fields.
interactions: row layout stacks at mobile widths
status labels remain visible without layout shift

components.name: SealPacketButton
components.purpose: Primary action for sealing the completed rollback-safe evidence packet.
interactions: hover and focus-visible states use accent tokens

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
